\tzpentry{ID5711}{Beat Mode Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5711 introduces Beat Mode Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \omega_{\text{beat}} &= \omega_\oplus - \omega_\text{Moon} \approx 7.006 \times 10^{-5} \text{ rad/s}\\ T_{\text{semidiurnal}} &= \frac{\pi}{\omega_{\text{beat}}} \approx 12.42 \text{ hours} \end{align}
